spotBuyLimitOrder.spec.ts
TC-01: navigate to Spot Trading page @smoke @sanity
TC-02: Spot Trading page shows all expected labels @smoke @sanity
TC-03: search currency pair in the market dropdown @sanity
TC-04: mark currency pair as favorite and verify it appears in Favorites tab @sanity
TC-05: unmark currency pair from favorites and verify "No records found" @sanity
TC-06: select currency pair from ALL tab @sanity
TC-08: order book column headers show Price, Amount and Total @sanity
TC-09: order book view switches — all / sell-only / buy-only @sanity
TC-10: order book precision dropdown changes price decimal places across all views @sanity
TC-11: order book LTP and buy/sell ratio bar (suggestions — not yet implemented) @sanity
TC-12: order book has actual ask and bid data rows @sanity
TC-13: top bid price is less than top ask price (valid spread) @sanity
TC-14: order book top bid/ask match Binance within 0.5% @sanity
TC-15: order book LTP matches Binance last price within 0.5% @sanity
TC-16: precision change alters LTP decimal display and restores cleanly @sanity
TC-17: clicking order book ask rows (5 rows) pre-fills Price and Amount inputs @sanity
TC-18: Buy button label shows "BUY {baseCoin}" dynamically @sanity
TC-19: Sell tab shows base currency available balance @sanity
TC-20: 25% button fills the amount with 25% of available balance @sanity
TC-21: 50% button fills the amount with 50% of available balance @sanity
TC-22: 75% button fills the amount with 75% of available balance @sanity
TC-23: 100% button fills the amount with 100% of available balance @sanity
TC-24: pair header displays the correct pair name after selection @sanity
TC-25: capture full balance snapshot before placing order @sanity
TC-26: enter limit price and total, verify estimated fee matches UI @sanity
TC-27: Total field auto-calculates as price × amount @sanity
TC-28: fetch available balance before placing order @sanity
